violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Open-air cooler in the front of the store was tempt at 50 degrees. Not holding a temperature of 41 or less.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The inside of the walk-in freezer door in broken and peeled back, exposing the insulation on the inside.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the kitchen needs to be cleaned. The green rack in the inside walk-in cooler needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single-use lids being stored on the floor in the back part of the kitchen.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The wall underneath the pizza box storage still has the shipping plastic on it and needs to be removed for it to be a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Both the walk-in cooler floors need to be cleaned.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Open-air cooler in the front of the store was tempt at 60 degrees. Not holding a temperature of 41 or less.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of cups and lids in the back space of the kitchen were on the floor.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Food wraps and pizza boxes were not inverted on the shelving in the back room by the pizza oven.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser in the kitchen was out of paper towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall behind the pizza needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
